articles.title: Oil surge divides Fed as Jay Powell’s term at helm draws to a close
articles.body: Central bank chair says he will remain a governor ‘for a period of time’ after Kevin Warsh succeeds him

articles.title: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh secures Senate committee approval
articles.body: Banking panel votes in favour of Donald Trump’s candidate to lead US central bank

articles.title: Trump’s Iran war has cost $25bn, Pentagon official says
articles.body: Use of costly missiles and air defence interceptors raises alarm about US readiness for other conflicts

articles.body: Investors to scrutinise AI spending plans from companies that represent almost one-fifth of the S&P 500’s market cap

articles.body: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

articles.title: CNBC Daily Open: UAE leaves OPEC adrift
articles.body: Markets grapple with the UAE's shock OPEC exit, while also contending with a host of earnings reports and a Fed decision later today.
